text.title: rust-testing-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rust-testing-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Integration tests sharing a Postgres container without truncation or transaction-rollback between tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tests fail in CI in random order because INSERT from one test is visible to another's SELECT or constraint check. Isolation must be explicit: per-test schema, per-test container, or BEGIN ... ROLLBACK wrapping.

failure-mode.description: Binding a real TCP listener on a hardcoded port (e.g., 127.0.0.1:8080) in integration tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Parallel test runs (cargo nextest) assign multiple tests to the same port and one panics with "address already in use". Use oneshot or bind to :0.
